case_title: SAMUEL WATSON STARR VS. MARIA OLMOS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STARR, SAMUEL WATSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLMOS, MARIA $1,310.96 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,340.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT: THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL AS TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF STARR, SAMUEL WATSON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-15-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OLMOS, MARIA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,310.96 FILED BY STARR, SAMUEL WATSON AS TO DEFENDANT OLMOS, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-08-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-25-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT OLMOS, MARIA
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STARR, SAMUEL WATSON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. SAMUEL WATSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA OLMOS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.
